pi_items.source: Web search of CDC NNDSS databases; CDC WONDER interface; data.cdc.gov resources. Actual Week 40 state-by-state reporting data not publicly accessible in format showing non-reporting jurisdictions.

privileged_info_summary: The nndss_missing_reports task uses synthetic data. The ground truth lists 8 US states (Alaska, Delaware, Hawaii, Montana, North Dakota, Rhode Island, Vermont, Wyoming) as non-reporting jurisdictions. All 8 states are verified as real US states. The task correctly references NNDSS as a real CDC surveillance system with 51 reporting jurisdictions (50 states + DC). The specific 8-state list cannot be verified against real NNDSS Week 40 data as: (1) actual Week 40 state-by-state non-reporting data is not publicly available in a queryable format, and (2) the data is synthetic, not sourced from real CDC reports. The task infrastructure is incomplete—referenced setup scripts and input CSV files do not exist in the codebase.
